channel.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jun 28th, 2021
item.description:
Community

Questions and Answers

  • #ada on Libera.Chat - Ada channel at IRC.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jun 5th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

Misc

  • septumstars10 - An interactive context-based text search tool for searching large codebases.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada May 27th, 2021
item.description:
Deployment

Continuous Integration

  • ada-actionsstars13 - Ada Toolchains for GitHub Actions

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Apr 15th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Graphics and Multimedia

  • asfmlstars2 - Ada binding to the Simple and Fast Multimedia Library.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Apr 14th, 2021
item.description:
Deployment

Build and Package

  • cmake-ada-offastars10 - Ada language support for CMake.
  • cmake-ada-cho3stars0 - CMake language support for Ada, fork of PLplot's cross-platform support code.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Mar 8th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Utilities

  • macos-sdks-vs-gccstars1 - Provides GCC 'specs' files to cope with SDK policy changes.
  • ux-stringsstars3 - Unicode extended strings.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Feb 19th, 2021
item.description:
Tools

UML

  • umbrello - Unified Modelling Language (UML) diagram program based on KDE Technology. Outputs Ada.

    • Frameworks

    Automation

  • aicwl - Collection of packages provided for design of high-quality industrial control widgets for Ada applications.
  • ada-for-automation - A4A is a framework for designing industrial automation applications using the Ada language.

    • Frameworks

    Components

  • lacestars12 - A set of Ada components to allow 3D simulations, games and GUI's in Ada.

    • Libraries

    Science

  • si - SI units checked and unchecked.

    • Applications

    Shells, Interpreters and Emulators

  • a-shellstars8 - A component to aid in writing shell-like applications in Ada.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jan 19th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Algorithms, Containers and Protocols

  • az3stars5 - Ada binding for Z3

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Format Readers and Writers

  • ada-tomlstars15 - TOML parser for Ada.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Oct 26th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

System Modeling

  • radalibstars6 - Ada library and tools for the analysis of Complex Networks and more.

    • Frameworks

    Graphical User Interface

  • fltk-ada - Ada-2012 port to FLTK.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Oct 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Algorithms, Containers and Protocols

  • smart-pointersstars0 - A package providing a reference-counted access type Smart_Pointer.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Oct 7th, 2020
item.description:
Education

Online books

  • ada-95-tutorial - A book going from beginner to advanced concepts in Ada 95, complete with source files.

    • Education

    Specialties

  • ada-at-rosetta-code - A collection of programming tasks and their sample solutions in Ada.

    • Edit

    Editors

  • leastars7 - LEA, a Lightweight Editor for Ada, aims to provide an easy, script-world-like, "look & feel" for developing Ada projects of any size and level, while enabling access to full-scale development tools like GNAT.

    • Edit

    Text Modes

  • vim-ada-bundlestars4 - Maintained Ada Bundle : Complete Ada-Mode for Vim/NeoVim.

    • Runtimes

  • adawebpackstars19 - GNAT RTL for WASM and bindings for Web API.

    • Libraries

    Cryptography

  • threefishstars3 - Ada Implementation of the Threefish-256 Encryption Algorithm.
  • ada-crypto-librarystars83 - This is a crypto library for Ada with a nice API and is written for the i386 and x86_64 hardware architecture.
  • spark-naclstars43 - SPARK 2014 re-implementation of the TweetNaCl crypto library.
  • libsodium-adastars6 - A secure cryptographic library (libsodium for Ada).
  • ada-libsecretstars1 - Ada Binding for the libsecret library.

    • Libraries

    Compression

  • dcf-adastars3 - An Ada 2012 library for document container files (Based on Zip-Ada).
  • zip-adastars7 - Zip-Ada is a programming library for dealing with the Zip compressed archive file format.
  • ada-lzmastars4 - Ada binding for liblzma compression library.

    • Libraries

    Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters

  • libadalangstars93 - Libadalang is a library for parsing and semantic analysis of Ada code. It is meant as a building block for integration into other tools (IDE, static analyzers, etc).

    • Libraries

    Format Readers and Writers

  • protobuf-adastars8 - Experimantal Ada code generation support for Google Protocol Buffers.
  • xml-ez - Library for emitting XML from Ada programs.

    • Libraries

    Graphics and Multimedia

  • adaglstars5 - Multiplatform Ada/OpenGL bindings (ported to native/OpenGL, A2JS/WebGL and WASM/WebGL).
  • orkastars39 - The OpenGL 4.6 Rendering Kernel in Ada 2012.
  • sdladastars74 - Ada 2012 bindings to SDL 2.
  • ada-nanovgstars1 - Ada bindings to NanoVG.
  • free-type-adastars1 - FreeType binding for Ada 2005.

    • Edit

    VSCode Extensions

  • ada-vscodestars1 - Basic syntax highlighting for Ada and GPR.

    • Frameworks

    Terminal User Interface

  • ncurses-ada95 - Ada95 bindings for ncurses.
  • cursesstars10 - Advanced UNIX Terminal UI Ada Binding Package.

    • Tools

    Generation

  • record-fluxstars56 - RecordFlux: Toolset for the formal specification of messages and the generation of verifiable binary parsers and message generators in SPARK.

    • Libraries

    Chatting and Communication

  • axmppstars7 - With the AXMPP library you can connect to a Jabber server to send and receive messages.
  • weechat-adastars1 - Ada 2012 library for WeeChat plug-ins.
  • weechat-canberrastars1 - A WeeChat plug-in written in Ada 2012 that plays sounds using Canberra.
  • weechat-emojistars1 - A WeeChat plug-in written in Ada 2012 that displays emoji.

    • Libraries

    Localization

  • zanyblue - An Ada package allowing the externalization of application messages into a properties file.

    • Libraries

    Utilities

  • a-stream-toolsstars1 - Stream utilities for Ada2005 and 2012.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Drivers

  • em-brickstars0 - emBRICK driver and support for emBRICK in Ada.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Applications

  • micro-tem-pistars2 - Raspberry Pi using a BBC Micro:Bit as temperature sensor.

    • Applications

    Simulation

  • covid-19-simulatorstars9 - Multi engine/algorithms COVID-19 simulator. Ada, Qt code under the hood.

    • Applications

    Generators and Translators

  • ada-magic - SofCheck AdaMagic is ACATS validated and certified Ada compiler targeting C and/or C++ (4 command line switches for fine tuning). ObjectAda and several other commercial compilers share engine with AdaMagic. MapuSoft distributes AdaMagic as integral component of AppCOE.

    • Frameworks

    3D

  • engine-3dstars2 - A 3D engine for DOS-talgics.

    • Frameworks

    Database

  • apq-base - APQ is a database interface library written in Ada95.

    • Libraries

    Math

  • lalgstars1 - Interface to dense linear algebra packages.

    • Libraries

    Networking and Communication Middleware

  • adasocketsstars12 - IPv4 socket library (TCP, UDP, and multicast).
  • dbus-ada - The D_Bus/Ada library provides an Ada binding to the D-Bus message bus system.
  • zeromq-adastars35 - Binding to the ZeroMQ comunications-library.

    • Libraries

    General Purpose Computing

  • cuda-ada - CUDA/Ada is an Ada binding to NVIDIA’s CUDA parallel computing platform and programming model.
  • opencl-adastars15 - An Ada binding for the OpenCL host API.

    • Libraries

    Sound

  • opus-adastars2 - Ada 2012 bindings for the Opus audio codec.
  • canberra-adastars4 - Ada 2012 bindings for libcanberra, an implementation of the XDG Sound Theme and Name Specifications.
  • ada-soundiostars4 - Ada bindings for libsoundio.
  • otostars3 - Ada binding to OpenAL which tries to mimic original API while using Ada types.

    • Libraries

    Robotics

  • rcladastars7 - Ada client library for ROS2/RCL.
  • player-adastars4 - Ada bindings for the player robotic platform.

    • Libraries

    Linux and POSIX

  • florist - POSIX Ada binding, IEEE Standards 1003.5(b,c).
  • wposixstars4 - Ada Windows POSIX binding.
  • ada-v4l2stars0 - Ada Posix Binding to Video 4 Linux, used for RPI.
  • inotify-adastars7 - An Ada 2012 library for monitoring filesystem events using Linux' inotify API.
  • dl-adastars0 - Minimal binding to libdl.

    • Libraries

    Windows and .NET

  • win32adastars11 - Ada API to the Windows library.
  • ada-net-framework-core - Ada bindings for the Microsft NetFramework Api.
  • ada-net-frameworkstars4 - Ada bindings to the Microsoft NetFramework Api.
  • ada-winrtstars8 - Ada bindings for the Microsft WinRT Api.
  • ada-win32stars2 - Ada bindings for the Microsoft Win32 Api.

    • Applications

    Programming Languages

  • ada-luastars34 - Ada binding for Lua.
  • coreland-lua-adastars5 - Ada bindings to the Lua language.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Sep 28th, 2020
item.description:
Deployment

Build and Package

  • ada4cmakestars2 - CMake macros for simple gnat project inclusion.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Aug 17th, 2020
item.description:
Frameworks

Components

  • simple-components - ASN.1, MQTT client and server/broker implementation, B-trees, Multiple connection TCP servers, Chebyshev series, Mutexes, Cryptography, Objects and handles to, Doubly-linked webs and lists, ODBC bindings, Blackboards (lock-free), OpenSSL bindings, ELV/eQ-3 MAX! client implementation, Parsers, Events (plain, pulse, array of), Persistent objects and handles to, GNUTLS bindings, Persistent storage and handles to, Graphs (directed, weighted, acyclic, trees), Pools, HTTP implementation, Sets and maps, FIFO (lock-free), SMTP client implementation, IEEE 754, SQLite bindings, Inter-process communication, Stacks, Interfacing Julia language, Streams, JSON, Strings editing, LDAP, Tables (maps of strings), MODBUS client implementation, Unbounded arrays.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Aug 4th, 2020
item.description:
Compilers

Online

  • compiler-explorer - Run GNAT FSF compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jul 29th, 2020
item.description:
OS and Kernels

  • m2os - RTOS with simple tasking support for small microcontrollers.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jul 2nd, 2020
item.description:
OS and Kernels

  • cubitstars61 - CuBitOS is a multi-processor, 64-bit, (partially) formally-verified, general-purpose operating system, currently for the x86-64 architecture.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada May 30th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Sound

  • ada-portable-sound - a linux-sound-playing package for Ada apps that can asynchronously start and stop music loops, as well as initiate transient sounds. Suitable for games.

    • Edit

    VSCode Extensions

  • adacore-ada - Language Support for Ada. It includes Language Server for Adastars98.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada May 10th, 2020
item.description:
Community

Questions and Answers

  • matrix-ada - Ada room at Matrix.

    • Community

    News and Resources

  • ada-planet - News Aggregator from the Ada programming language world.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Apr 30th, 2020
item.description:
Edit

VSCode Extensions

  • ada-utilitiesstars0 - VSCode extension Ada programmers which provides a few utility functions.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Apr 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Algorithms, Containers and Protocols

  • ada-lspstars10 - Language Server Protocol for Ada.
  • ada-lsp-clientstars1 - Prototype implementation of LSP client - Visual Studio 2017.

    • Libraries

    Cryptography

  • fletcherstars0 - Trivial implementation of fletcher_16 checksum computation algorithm.
  • base58-adastars4 - Base58 encoding and decoding in Ada.
  • libsparkcryptostars24 - A cryptographic library implemented in SPARK.
  • sip-hashstars1 - A pure Ada implementation of the SipHash PRF.
  • libkeccakstars21 - A SPARK implementation of the Keccak family of sponge functions and related constructions.
  • ascon-sparkstars1 - Ada/SPARK implementation of the Ascon Authenticated Encryption with Additional Data Algorithm.
  • spark-sip-hashstars5 - Ada/SPARK implementation of the SipHash keyed hash function.
  • spark-norxstars8 - Ada/SPARK implementation of the NORX Authenticated Encryption with Additional Data Algorithm.
  • stotpstars5 - Timed One-Time-Pad (RFC 6238) implementation in SPARK.
  • xxhash-adastars1 - Extremely fast non-cryptographic Hash algorithm, xxhash is working at speeds close to RAM limits.

    • Bindings

  • hungarianstars1 - Ada wrapper for the fast Stachniss' Hungarian solver.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Mar 31st, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Simulation

  • ghdlstars1.3k - VHDL 2008/93/87 simulator.

    • Tools

    Encryption

  • ada-keystorestars23 - Ada Keystore - protect your sensitive data with secure storage.

    • Libraries

    Algorithms, Containers and Protocols

  • ada-language-serverstars98 - Adacore server implemention of the the Microsoft Language Protocol for Ada and SPARK.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Mar 29th, 2020
item.description:
Education

Online books

  • ada-cpp-java - Ada for the C++ or Java Developer.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Mar 15th, 2020
item.description:
Education

Tutorials

  • ada-crash-course - Ada 2012 crash course under 50 pages from Vermont Technical College.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Mar 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Bindings

  • tcl-ada-shellstars4 - Tcl Ada SHell (Tash) is an Ada binding to Tcl/Tk.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:
Bindings

  • tashystars7 - Tashy is short from Tcl Ada SHell Younger. It is derivate of Tash, focused mostly on Tk binding.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Feb 18th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

UML

  • ada-mlstars4 - Ada-tailored UML Modeling Language.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jan 15th, 2020
item.description:
Compilers

Commercial / Open source

  • gnat-pro - The GNAT Pro product line offers a comprehensive toolset (IDEs, debugger, librairies, dynamic and static analysis tools) for Ada, C and C++.

    • Compilers

    Commercial / Closed source

  • janus-ada - Compiler supporting all the major features of the Ada 83, Ada 95, Ada 2005 and Ada 2012 versions of the language.
  • object-ada - PTC ObjectAda is an extensive family of native and cross development tools and runtime environments.
  • apex-ada - PTC ApexAda is one of the industry’s most popular development environments for Ada and mixed Ada/C/C++ applications.
  • greenhills-ada - Green Hills Software offers the industry's first, fully validated family of Ada Cross Compilers for real-time targets.
  • xgc - XGC provide GCC-based bare-metal toolchains with Ada95 support for aerospace-specific targets such as MIL1750, ERC32 and LEON. As well as a legacy M68000 toolchain.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jan 13th, 2020
item.description:
Compilers

GPL (no linking exception)
  • gnat-ce - GNAT Community edition. A release of AdaCore GNAT for free software developers, hobbyists, and students. The run-time libraries provided with GNAT Community are licensed under GPLv3 without linking exception. It supports Ada 2012 only.

    • OS and Kernels

  • havkstars10 - x86-64 security-focused OS being created with SPARK.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jan 12th, 2020
item.description:
Compilers

GPL (with linking exception)
  • fsf-gnat - Free Software Foundation compiler for the Ada programming language which forms part of the GNU Compiler Collection. It supports all versions of the language, i.e. Ada 2012, Ada 2005, Ada 95 and Ada 83.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Dec 21st, 2019
item.description:
Runtimes

  • cortex-gnat-rtsstars39 - This package includes GNAT Ada Run Time Systems (RTSs) based on FreeRTOS and targeted at boards with Cortex-M0, M3, -M4, -M4F MCUs.

    • Tools

    Verification

  • acatsstars5 - The Ada Conformity Assessment Test Suite, customised for GCC.
  • acats-gradingstars1 - Tools for grading ACATS results, modified for Unix-like systems.

    • Tools

    UML

  • coldframestars4 - ColdFrame generates Ada framework code and documentation from UML models.

    • Libraries

    Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters

  • xiastars2 - An Ada implementation of XPath 1.0.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Drivers

  • multiplexed-iostars0 - This contains explorations, for AdaPilot, of implementing drivers for the AdaRacer MCU, using the Ravenscar profile of Ada 2012 from AdaCore and device bindings generated using SVD2Ada.

    • Applications

    Generators and Translators

  • cappuladastars11 - Ada binding generator for C++.
  • asis2xmlstars0 - Converts Ada sources’ ASIS representation to XML, so as to make it easier to develop reporting and transformational tools using (for example) XSLT.

    • Applications

    Shells, Interpreters and Emulators

  • analytical-enginestars6 - An Ada 2012 emulation of Charles Babbage’s Analytical Engine.

    • Applications

    Misc

  • dhondtstars3 - Ada implementation of D’Hondt electoral result calculator.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Dec 18th, 2019
item.description:
Compilers

Other / unknown licence
  • hacstars49 - Experimental Ada compiler fully in Ada.

    • Frameworks

    Graphical User Interface

  • gwindowsstars6 - GNU Ada Visual Interface.

    • Frameworks

    3D

  • globe-3dstars10 - GL Object Based Engine for 3D.

    • Libraries

    Math

  • mathpaqsstars6 - Mathpaqs is a collection of mathematical, 100% portable, packages in the Ada programming language.

    • Libraries

    Format Readers and Writers

  • ini-filesstars3 - The Ini file manager consists of a package, Config, which can read and modify informations from various configuration files known as "ini" files.
  • excel-writerstars3 - Create Excel files with basic formats.
  • generic-image-decoderstars10 - Multi-format image decoder library for Ada.
  • ada-pdf-writerstars9 - Ada package for producing easily and automatically PDF files, from an Ada program, with text, vector graphics, images (JPEG).
  • ada-bar-codesstars8 - Ada Bar Codes provides a package for generating various types of bar codes (1D, or 2D like QR codes) on different output formats, such as PDF or SVG.

    • Applications

    Office

  • azipstars4 - A free, portable Zip Archive Manager.
  • texcadstars3 - TeXCAD is a program for drawing or retouching {picture}s in LaTeX.
  • cbsgstars3 - The Corporate Bullshit Generator.

    • Applications

    Web

  • wasabeestars5 - A Web browser with safety focus.

    • Applications

    Generators and Translators

  • pascal-to-adastars3 - A Pascal to Ada translator.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Dec 11th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Math

  • mandelbrot-asciistars0 - Mandelbrot renderer in "ASCII" (unicode actually, but text nonetheless).

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Nov 21st, 2019
item.description:
OS and Kernels

  • ada-kalinda-os - Ada_KALINDA is a sort of Mac Plus like OS written in Ada95.
  • cxosstars28 - Ada Operating System development example.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Nov 20th, 2019
item.description:
OS and Kernels

  • lovelace-os - Lovelace is an effort to write a Unix like operating system using the Ada 2012 language.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Nov 14th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Sound

  • scala - Scala is a powerful software tool for experimentation with musical tunings, such as just intonation scales, equal and historical temperaments, microtonal and macrotonal scales, and non-Western scales.

    • Community

    Questions and Answers

  • subreddit-ada - Ada at Reddit.
  • subreddit-spark - Spark at Reddit.
  • gitter-ada - Ada channel at Gitter.
  • telegram-ada - Ada group at Telegram.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
Edit

Text Modes

  • bbedit-ada-module - BBEdit support for Ada.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Oct 14th, 2019
item.description:
Frameworks

Components

  • gneissstars18 - Gneiss is an interface collection to be used with applications for component based systems. It aims to be easily portable/platform independent and is compatible with the ada-runtimestars30.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Sep 9th, 2019
item.description:
Applications

Office

  • hunterstars19 - Graphical (GtkAda) file manager for Linux.

    • Applications

    Web

  • yassstars13 - Yet Another Static Site Generator (like Jekyll or Hugo).

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Aug 17th, 2019
item.description:
Games

  • mine-detectorstars0 - Mine Detector: a mine-finding game that never requires guessing.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jul 18th, 2019
item.description:
Education

Reference

  • adalibstars7 - Standard Ada library specification as defined in Reference Manual.

    • Frameworks

    Database

  • ada-basestars21 - Thick database bindings to MySQL, PostgreSQL and SQLite for Ada.

    • Libraries

    Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters

  • parser-toolsstars6 - Tools for writing lexers / parsers in Ada.

    • Libraries

    Sound

  • ada-synth-libstars29 - Simple audio synthesis library.

    • Libraries

    Utilities

  • cvsweb2gitstars0 - Tool to imports CVS repository shared on Ada Conformity Assessment Authority into the Git repository.
  • ada-bundlerstars5 - Library and tool for transparently handling data and configuration file access in an Ada application. Supports MacOSX, Linux and Windows.
  • licensingstars0 - Open Source Licenses library for Ada.
  • simple-logging - Easy to use logging facilities for output to console in Ada programs.
  • rsfilestars0 - Command-line utility that picks a file from a folder hierarchy with probability proportional to its size.
  • cstringsstars0 - Convenience subprograms to interact with C strings.

    • Tools

    Generation

  • ajunitgenstars1 - Generator of JUnit-compatible XML reports in Ada.

    • Libraries

    Algorithms, Containers and Protocols

  • adagiostars3 - Gnutella2 (G2) network server leaf.
  • agplstars3 - Ada General Purpose Library (Miscellaneous utilities, with a robotic flavor).

    • Libraries

    Patterns

  • rxadastars5 - An Ada 2012 implementation of the Rx methodology.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Libraries

  • sanctastars1 - SANCTA multi-robot task allocation library.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada May 9th, 2019
item.description:
Games

  • pasta - Pasta! is a game of the "match-3" genre.
  • buttonsstars2 - A simple Gtkada Button Mania game.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Apr 28th, 2019
item.description:
Edit

Integrated Development Editor

  • ada-visual - Ada language integration for Visual Studio 2017.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Mar 31st, 2019
item.description:
Deployment

Build and Package

  • alirestars110 - A catalog of ready-to-use Ada libraries plus a command-line tool (alr) to obtain, compile, and incorporate them into your own projects. It aims to fulfill a similar role to Rust's cargo or OCaml's opam.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Mar 11th, 2019
item.description:
Runtimes

  • ada-runtimestars30 - A downsized Ada runtime which can be adapted to different platforms.

    • Bindings

  • boehmgc-adastars3 - Ada binding to the Boehm-Demers-Weiser conservative garbage collector.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Feb 24th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Algorithms, Containers and Protocols

  • simple-blockchainstars19 - Simple blockchain in Ada.
  • charles - Charles is an Ada 95 container library, precursor to Ada 2005+ standard containers.

    • Applications

    Shells, Interpreters and Emulators

  • sparforte - SPARforte programming language is an Ada-like scripting language, previously known as business user shell (bush). Can be used as interactive UNIX shell replacement.
  • gshstars56 - GSH is non interactive POSIX shell for Windows, aimed at GNU software builds. 2-3 times faster than Cygwin.
  • gnatcoll-scripts-shell - GNATCOLL.Scripts.Shell is a simple embeddable scripting language, part of GNATCOLL Core.

    • Applications

    Programming Languages

  • para-sail - ParaSail is a highly parallel experimental language, similar to Go and Erlang. Originaly owned by SofCheck (now AdaCore), it is a test project to try new ideas. Expandable pointers is a sample feature that is about to be introduced to SPARK and Ada. There are in fact 4 experimental languages: ParaSail, Sparkel, Javallel, Parython, all sharing bytecode interpreter and LLVM engine.

    • Applications

    Generators and Translators

  • a2js - Ada2JS is experimental open source compiler, component of Matreshka.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Feb 13th, 2019
item.description:
Hardware and Embedded

Communication

  • sensortile - This project shows how to initialize a SensorTile and how to send sensor data over BLE from a SensorTile to a suitable host.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Feb 11th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Algorithms, Containers and Protocols

  • dequesterity - Deque/buffer generics that consist of building blocks that may be combined in various ways to create higher abstraction buffers.
  • paraffin - A suite of Ada 2012 generics to facilitate iterative and recursive parallelism for multicore systems.
  • deepend - Deepend is a storage pool with subpool capabilities for Ada 2012, Ada 2005, and Ada 95.

    • Education

    Online books

  • ada-wikibook - Ada Programming book at Wikibooks.
  • ada-distilled - Ada Distilled for Ada 2005.
  • ada-craft - Ada 95: The Craft of Object-Oriented Programming.
  • spark-guidance - Implementation Guidance for the Adoption of SPARK.
  • ada-safe-secure - Safe and Secure Software. An invitation to Ada 2012.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Feb 7th, 2019
item.description:
Bindings

  • ada-bfdstars4 - Ada BFD is an Ada binding for the GNU Binutils BFD library. It allows to read binary ELF, COFF files by using the GNU BFD.

    • Frameworks

    Web

  • swagger-adastars11 - Ada support for Swagger codegen: OpenAPI Generator is a code generator that supports generation of API client libraries, server stubs and documentation automatically given an OpenAPI Spec.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Applications

  • etherscopestars18 - Ethernet traffic monitor on a STM32F746 board.

    • Frameworks

    Components

  • ada-utilstars44 - A logging framework close to Java log4j framework, support for properties, serialization/deserialization framework for XML/JSON/CSV, Ada beans framework, encoding/decoding framework (Base16, Base64, SHA, HMAC-SHA), a composing stream framework (raw, files, buffers, pipes, sockets), several concurrency tools (reference counters, counters, pools, fifos, arrays), process creation and pipes, support for loading shared libraries (on Windows or Unix), HTTP client library on top of CURL or AWS.

    • Frameworks

    Database

  • ada-adostars17 - Ada Database Objects is an Ada05 library that provides object relational mapping to access a database in Ada05. The library supports Postgresql, MySQL, SQLite as databases. Most of the concepts developped for ADO come from the Java Hibernate ORM.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jan 30th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

Generation

  • automatestars1 - Finite-state machine generator.

    • Applications

    Generators and Translators

  • j2adastars0 - Translator for a Java valid source code in Ada source code.

    • Bindings

  • tp7-ada-gtkadastars1 - Implementation of Turbo Pascal 7.0 units with GTKAda.
  • tp7-ada-gnogastars2 - Implementation of Turbo Pascal 7.0 units with Gnoga.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jan 29th, 2019
item.description:
Education

Specialties

  • ada-compositionstars2 - A collections of small nifty demos/sample code that may help better layout data or structure project.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jan 14th, 2019
item.description:
Community

News and Resources

  • adacore-blog - An insight into the AdaCore ecosystem.

    • Frameworks

    Graphical User Interface

  • qt-ada - Ada-2012 port to QT 5 framework.
  • vtk-ada - Ada-2012 port to VTK 8.1 (Visualization Toolkit).

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jan 5th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters

  • aforthstars14 - Embeddable Forth interpreter written in Ada.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jan 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Frameworks

3D

  • ada-doom-3stars214 - Id Software's Id-tech-4-BFG in the Ada programming language.

    Multimedia

  • ada-3dsstars3 - A simple 3DS Max model renderer.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jan 2nd, 2019
item.description:
Bindings

  • areadlinestars6 - Ada interface to the readline library.

    • Libraries

    Format Readers and Writers

  • abf-iostars0 - A library of access routines to Axon's ABF file format (electrophysiology, most common) in Ada.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Jan 1st, 2019
item.description:
Frameworks

Machine Learning

  • fuzzyml - Fuzzy machine learning framework.

    • Libraries

    Patterns

  • ada-promisesstars4 - Implementing promises in Ada. Type-safe, efficient, thread-safe.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Dec 29th, 2018
item.description:
Frameworks

Graphical User Interface

  • claw - CLAW, a High Level, Portable, Ada 95 Binding for Microsoft Windows.

    • Libraries

    System Modeling

  • ada-fuzzystars2 - A fuzzy inference system library for Ada.

    • Libraries

    Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters

  • wisitoken - WisiToken is an LALR, LR1, and Packrat parser generator and run-time.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Dec 21st, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Patterns

  • reqrep-task-poolsstars1 - Task pool system for jobs.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Dec 20th, 2018
item.description:
Education

Entry Point

  • learn - Interactive learning platform designed to teach the Ada and SPARK programming languages.

    • Education

    Tutorials

  • adacore-video-tutorials - AdaCore University Video Tutorials.
  • simple-games - Learning Ada 2012 by writing simple games.
  • spark-by-examplestars121 - Collection of verified functions and data types in SPARK.

    • Education

    Specialties

  • gems - Ada Gem Archive.
  • ada-ic-learning - For additional learning resources, see the AdaIC learning section.

    • Education

    Reference

  • iso-standard - The 2012 revision to the Ada Standard, usually known as Ada 2012.

    • Community

    Questions and Answers

  • comp-lang-ada - Ada Usenet newsgroup/forum.
  • stack-overflow-ada-tag - Ada at Stack Overflow.

    • Community

    News and Resources

  • ada-europe - Ada-Europe is an international organization, set up to promote the use of Ada.
  • acm-sig-ada - The Special Interest Group on Ada.
  • ada-resource-association - Since 1990 the Ada Resource Association’s principal mission has been “To ensure continued success of Ada users and promote Ada use in the software industry”.
  • ada-information-clearinghouse - News and resources for the Ada programming language.

    • Compilers

    Other / unknown licence
  • byronstars44 - The Byron project is a community-driven Ada compiler, toolchain, and IDE-system.

    • Compilers

    Online

  • tutorials-point-ada-compiler - Online compiler built on the CodingGround engine.

    • Edit

    Text Modes

  • gnu-emacs-ada-mode - Gnu Emacs major-mode for editing Ada sources.
  • ada-tmbundlestars7 - TextMate support for Ada.

    • Deployment

    Build and Package

  • gprbuildstars43 - Adacore multi-language software build tool.
  • ravenadmstars14 - Administration tool for Ravenports http://www.ravenports.com.
  • synthstars220 - Next D/Ports build tool for live systems (Alternative for Portmaster and Portupgrade tools).

    • Deployment

    Continuous Integration

  • continuous-verificationstars7 - SPARK formal verification automated with Travis CI.

    • Runtimes

  • bb-runtimesstars43 - GNAT bare metal board support package (BSP).
  • avr-ada - GNAT for 8-bit AVR microcontrollers.

    • OS and Kernels

  • muen - An x86/64 Separation Kernel for High Assurance.
  • ewokstars59 - EwoK is a microkernel targeting micro-controllers and embedded systems.

    • Games

  • steamsky - Roguelike in sky with a steampunk setting.
  • unity-ada-tetris - Tetris, in Ada, for the Unity game engine.
  • tictactoestars1 - A tictactoe game written and proven in SPARK/Ada.
  • ada-gatestars16 - AdaGate is a first-person 3D sokoban puzzle game within a Stargate / Portal fantasy setting for Windows, OS-X and Linux.
  • rufas-cubestars3 - RufasCube is a puzzle game for Windows, OS-X and GNU Linux... it looks like a rubic cube but it's a slider, not a twister.
  • ada-venturestars4 - AdaVenture is a kid-friendly retro point&click game with mazes, dragons, bats & snakes.
  • terminal-apps - Fun puzzle games that run on any terminal on any OS.
  • mini-pacman - MiniPac is a kid friendly ascii character version of Pacman that plays in a commandline terminal.
  • world-cup-sokerbanstars2 - This is a soccer-themed, 3D sokoban puzzle game that runs on Windows, Mac OS-X and GNU Linux.

    • Frameworks

    Components

  • gnatcoll-corestars35 - This is the core module of the GNAT Components Collection.
  • gnatcoll-bindingsstars7 - This is the bindings module of the GNAT Components Collection.
  • gnatcoll-dbstars10 - This is the DB module of the GNAT Components Collection.

    • Frameworks

    Distributed

  • poly-orbstars17 - PolyORB provides a uniform solution to build distributed applications relying either on middleware standards.

    • Frameworks

    Graphical User Interface

  • gnoga - The GNU Omnificent GUI for Ada.
  • gtkadastars66 - Ada graphical toolkit based on Gtk3 components.

    • Frameworks

    3D

  • ada-oglstars2 - Ada OpenGL Framework.

    • Frameworks

    Unit Test, Testing

  • ahven - Ahven is a simple unit test library and framework for the Ada programming.

    • Frameworks

    Logging

  • alog - Alog is a stackable logging framework for Ada.

    • Tools

    Verification

  • gnat-coveragestars23 - GNATcoverage is a tool to analyze and report program coverage.
  • adacontrol - Ada constructs lint tool.
  • spark-2014stars128 - SPARK formal verification toolset.

    • Tools

    Generation

  • asn1sccstars167 - ASN1SCC: An open source ASN.1 generator to Ada type declarations and encoders/decoders.
  • ocarinastars38 - AADL model processor: mappings to Ada code; Petri Nets; scheduling tools (MAST, Cheddar); WCET; REAL.
  • fmt - Formal Methods Toolkit is a set of extension packages for Mathematica, supporting software. engineering activities related to modeling, verification and Ada code generation.

    • Libraries

    Math

  • math-packagesstars17 - Collection of basic math routines in Ada.

    • Libraries

    Algorithms, Containers and Protocols

  • ada-traits-containersstars19 - Generic Ada Library for Algorithms and Containers.
  • pragmarcstars18 - PragmAda Reusable Components (PragmARCs) from PragmAda S/W Engineering.
  • ada-idstars12 - Simple Ada library for generating UUIDs.
  • ada-gastars2 - Genetic Algorithm Implementation for Ada.
  • ada-sodokustars5 - Small Library for Sodoku grid solving / finding.
  • sl3pstars1 - Simple Layer 3 Protocol.
  • hungarian-algorithmstars1 - Hungarian Algorithm implementation in Ada.
  • sal - SAL (Stephe's Ada Library).
  • nb-adastars10 - NBAda : An Ada library of lock-free data structures and algorithms.

    • Libraries

    Parsers, Scanners, Linters, Analysers, Interpreters and Prettyprinters

  • aflex-ayacc - Ada95 scanner and parser generators.
  • gelastars0 - Ada code analyzer.
  • anagramstars2 - Grammar handling and parser generation Ada library.
  • ada-prettystars1 - Pretty printing library for Ada.
  • incrementstars2 - Incremental analysis in Ada.
  • parse-argsstars7 - Simple command-line argument parsing.

    • Libraries

    Format Readers and Writers

  • ada-yamlstars26 - Experimental YAML 1.3 implementation in Ada.
  • json-adastars18 - An Ada 2012 library for parsing JSON.
  • jwxstars15 - A formally verified JSON library in SPARK.
  • xmladastars18 - The XML/Ada toolkit.
  • spark-xmlstars13 - A formally verified XML library in SPARK.
  • ada-midistars4 - Implementation of Midi / MidiFile reading and writing.
  • ada-bin2ascstars0 - Various binary-to-ASCII codecs such as Base64.

    • Libraries

    Networking and Communication Middleware

  • adhcp - ADHCP is an implementation of the DHCP protocol in Ada.

    • Libraries

    Graphics and Multimedia

  • opengl-adastars70 - Thick Ada binding for OpenGL and GLFW.

    • Libraries

    Sound

  • ada-synthetizerstars11 - Sound Synthetizer Library implemented in Ada.

    • Libraries

    Utilities

  • auto-countersstars4 - Reference counting approaches to resource management.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Frameworks

  • robotics-with-adastars14 - Robotics with Ada, ARM, and Lego.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Firmwares

  • certifliestars21 - Source code for the full Ada + SPARK Crazyflie 2.0 firmware.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Drivers

  • ada-drivers-librarystars173 - Ada drivers for various MCU and sensors.
  • dw1000stars9 - Ada/SPARK driver for the DecaWave DW1000 ultra-wideband (UWB) radio chip.
  • evb1000stars0 - Ada/SPARK drivers to control the on-board peripherals of the DecaWave EVB1000 evaluation board.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Controllers

  • solenoid-engine-controllerstars3 - Software controller for solenoid engines (Ada/STM32F4).

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Libraries

  • gizastars6 - Giza is trying to be a simple widget tool kit for embedded platforms.
  • ada-synth-libstars29 - Simple audio synthesis library.
  • gestestars11 - GESTE is a sprite and tile 2D render engine designed to run on micro-controllers.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Applications

  • coffee-clockstars5 - Waking up with a fresh cup of coffee.
  • noise-nuggetstars12 - Square Inch Synthesizer.
  • spark-railway-demostars6 - Simulated railway network in SPARK/Ada.
  • wee-noise-makerstars11 - Wee Noise Maker is an open source pocket synthesizer.
  • lunar-lander-rotationstars1 - Program that interacts with the AdaFruit BNO055 breakout board in order to send orientation data to a host computer.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Bindings

  • ada-timestars15 - Ada binding for the Pebble Time smartwatch.
  • wiring-pi-adastars0 - Ada bindings for wiringPi.

    • Applications

    Mail

  • trash-finder - Trash Finder is a mail filter that operates as a plugin for your mail server, providing filtering on dozens of criteria along with management of known good mail.

    • Applications

    Web

  • ironsides - Authoritative DNS server verified by SPARK/Ada.

    • Applications

    Multimedia

  • eagle-landerstars27 - Apollo 11 lunar lander simulator (Ada/Gtk/Cairo).

    • Applications

    Automation

  • acncstars57 - A G-code parser and CNC controller (in Ada).

    • Applications

    Simulation

  • parallel-simstars1 - Distributed Simulation of Transport Networks.

    • Applications

    Generators and Translators

  • adabrowse - HTML generator for Ada95 library unit specs.
  • tiled-code-genstars1 - Code generator for Tiled the map editor.
  • cvsweb2gitstars0 - This tool imports CVS repository shared on Ada Conformity Assessment Authority into the Git repository.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Dec 16th, 2018
item.description:
Frameworks

Components

  • gnatcoll-jsonstars4 - This is a set of helpers for writing JSON-intefaces it contains JSON parses for most of the Ada runtime components.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Dec 11th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Utilities

  • ssprepstars0 - An extensible template engine akin to jinja but using template-parserstars3 and intended for command line usage.

    • Frameworks

    Web

  • matreshka - Matreshka is an Ada framework to develop information systems. It consists of five major components: League, XML processor, Web framework, SQL access, and the Modeling framework.

    • Bindings

  • pcsc-ada - PCSC/Ada provides a thick Ada binding to PC/SC-middleware. The library allows programs written in Ada to communicate with smart cards using the SCard API.

    • Games

  • co-terminal-appsstars5 - Retro Games that run in a terminal on any platform.

    • OS and Kernels

  • bare-bonesstars69 - An Ada port of the osdev.org minimal 32-bit x86 kernel.
  • marte-os - MaRTE OS is a Hard Real-Time Operating System for embedded applications that follows the Minimal Real-Time POSIX.13 subset. It provides an easy to use and controlled environment to develop Multi-Thread Real-Time applications.

    • Compilers

    Online

  • jdoodle-ada-compiler - Online compiler that provides multiple versions of GNAT to test with.

    • Libraries

    Web

  • template-parserstars3 - AWS templates engine.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Dec 6th, 2018
item.description:
Hardware and Embedded

Applications

  • railway-simulationstars4 - Program simulating a railway network with trains, switches and signaling. The signaling system is proven with SPARK/Ada to ensure that trains cannot collide.

    • Hardware and Embedded

    Bindings

  • svd2adastars43 - An Ada binding generator from SVD descriptions for bare board ARM devices.

item.title: ohenley/awesome-ada Oct 24th, 2018
item.description:
Frameworks

Web

  • awsstars91 - AWS is a complete framework to develop Web based applications in Ada.
  • awastars66 - Ada Web Application is a framework to build a Web Application in Ada 2012. The framework provides several ready to use and extendable modules that are common to many web application. This includes the login, authentication, users, permissions, managing comments, tags, votes, documents, images.
    • dynamostars10 - Code generator used to generate an Ada Web Application or database mappings from hibernate-like XML description, YAML doctrine model or UML models.
    • ada-wikistars15 - Ada Wiki is a small library that provides a Wiki engine.
    • ada-securitystars16 - OAuth 2.0 client and server framework to secure web applications.
    • ada-elstars6 - This library provides the support for a simple Expression Language close to the Java Unified Expression Language (EL).
    • ada-asfstars11 - Ada Server Faces allows to create web applications using the same pattern as the Java Server Faces (See JSR 252, JSR 314 and JSR 344).
    • ada-servletstars6 - Ada Servlet allows to create web applications using the same pattern as the Java Servlet (See JSR 154, JSR 315).

    • Libraries

    Networking and Communication Middleware

  • anet - Anet is a networking library for the Ada programming language.

    • Libraries

    Algorithms, Containers and Protocols

  • booch95 - The Ada 95 Booch components are a port of Grady Booch's C++ components.
